subject: Yanmega, a large dragonfly-like Pokémon with four wings, a segmented green and black body, and large compound eyes
description: Yanmega is shown hovering in the center of the frame, its large body angled slightly toward the viewer. The Pokémon has a long segmented body in green and dark charcoal, with four prominent wings — two large forward and two smaller rear — rendered in a translucent teal-green. Large compound eyes dominate the head, and the abdomen tapers to a pointed tip. The background is a dense leafy green environment suggesting a forest canopy or jungle setting, with light filtering through the foliage.
foreground: Yanmega hovering, wings spread, compound eyes prominent
background: Dense leafy forest canopy, dappled green light
